## Description
Describe the intent, scope, and outcomes of this change.

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Infra
- [ ] Security

## BRAND EXPERIENCE IMPACT
- Does this change affect UI/UX? [Yes/No]
- Has this been reviewed against the 5 Emotional Design Pillars? [Yes/No]
- Does this maintain Sensory Consistency (colors, typography, motion, sound, haptics)? [Yes/No]
- Which Emotional Design Pillar(s) affected? [Discovery/Pride/Aspiration/Belonging/Empowerment]

## Testing checklist
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm type-check`

## Screenshots / video (for UI changes)
Attach screenshots or a short clip showing the updated experience.
